title: Cope With Relationship Trauma
metaDescription: Relationship trauma therapy for individuals and couples at Voice Awareness Psychotherapy.
body:
Relationship trauma can be multi symptomatic and complex. Whether you are healing from a difficult partnership, navigating attachment wounds, or rebuilding trust after betrayal, therapy offers a structured and compassionate space to process what happened.

## How Therapy Can Help

I offer therapeutic techniques to create an opportunity for individuals or couples to:

- Process thoughts and feelings related to relationship wounds
- Identify patterns that keep you stuck in cycles of pain or conflict
- Develop healthier communication and boundaries
- Expand your support system and sense of safety

## A Client-Centered Approach

Therapy is collaborative and paced to your comfort. Modalities may include Internal Family Systems (IFS), Emotionally Focused Therapy (EFT), trauma-informed psychotherapy, and mindfulness-based interventions.

You do not have to carry relationship trauma alone. With consistent support, it is possible to rebuild trust—in yourself and in others—and move toward relationships that feel safe and fulfilling.
